case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS RIAN DONNELLY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $775.62 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RIAN DONNELLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
